text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷Reuters: The Iranian flagged Touska is likely to have what the U.S. sees as dual use equipment that could be used by the military. While the maritime security source didn’t specify what goods are onboard, CENTCOM has identified a range of goods that…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇺🇳 Iranian Ambassador to the UN Amir-Saeid Iravani wrote a letter to UN Secretary General Guterres and President of the Security Council Alrowaiei calling for them to swiftly and firmly condemn the U.S. seizure of the Touska and the detention of its crew. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷路透社：伊朗旗帜的Touska号货轮上可能装有美国认为可用于军事的军民两用设备。虽然海事安全消息来源未具体说明船上装载的货物，但美国中央司令部已确定了一系列货物……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇺🇳 伊朗驻联合国大使阿米尔-赛义德·伊拉瓦尼致信联合国秘书长古特雷斯和安理会主席阿尔罗瓦伊，呼吁他们迅速且坚定地谴责美国扣押Touska号及其船员的行为。 @wfwitness

text: Nuno Felix RT @t1mes1nk : @GrafKorina @UN_PGA Hier der y/t Link zum vollen 19 minütigen Interview für Interessierte. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uQqzSXVmh3o tweet

text: WarMonitor RT @atrupar : REPORTER: Can you explain the computer log in issue? Your lawsuit contends you were not able to log into the system KASH PATEL: Let's have a survey. How many of you people believe that's true? REPORTER: Did you communicate with anyone you thought you were fired? PATEL: It's an absolute lie. It never happened. You are lying. REPORTER: The lawsuit says the opposite! tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转发 @atrupar : 记者：你能解释一下电脑登录的问题吗？你的诉讼声称你无法登录系统。卡什·帕特尔（KASH PATEL）：我们来做个调查。你们中有多少人相信那是真的？记者：你是否与任何你认为你被解雇的人沟通过？帕特尔：这绝对是谎言。从来没有发生过。你在撒谎。记者：诉讼内容恰恰相反！推文

text: Faytuks News RT @TankerTrackers : BREAKING: PRELIMINARY (VISUALLY UNVERIFIED) AIS DATA IMPLIES THAT AN IRANIAN-FLAGGED TANKER LADEN WITH TWO MILLION BARRELS HAS NOW BEEN REDIRECTED BACK TO IRAN FROM THE ARABIAN SEA #OOTT #IranWar #Tankers tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 转发 @TankerTrackers : 突发：初步（未经视觉核实）AIS 数据显示，一艘载有两百万桶原油的伊朗籍油轮现已从阿拉伯海被改道返回伊朗 #OOTT #IranWar #Tankers 推文

text: 🇮🇷 | Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya (Armed Forces) warns the US: In light of the repeated threats by Trump & its invading terrorist commanders we warn them: Our capable & powerful forces have long been at a state of 100% readiness, with their fingers on the trigger so that in the event of aggression or any action against Iran, we will immediately and forcefully strike pre-designated targets and deliver another lesson, harsher than before, to the US aggressor & the child-killing Zionist regime. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🇮🇷 | 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚（武装部队）警告美国：鉴于特朗普及其入侵的恐怖主义指挥官的反复威胁，我们警告他们：我们能干而强大的部队早已处于100%的战备状态，手指扣在扳机上，以便在发生针对伊朗的侵略或任何行动时，我们将立即有力地打击预定目标，并给美国侵略者和杀害儿童的犹太复国主义政权以比以前更严厉的教训。 @FotrosResistancee

text: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 Advisor to Iran’s Parliament Speaker: ‘Trump's extension of the ceasefire makes no sense. The losing side cannot set the terms. Continuing the siege is no different from bombing and must be responded to militarily. Meanwhile, Trump's extension of the ceasefire certainly means buying time for a surprise strike. It is Iran's time to take the initiative.’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长顾问：“特朗普延长停火协议毫无意义。失败的一方不能设定条件。继续围困与轰炸没有区别，必须进行军事回应。同时，特朗普延长停火协议肯定意味着为突然袭击争取时间。现在是伊朗采取主动的时候了。” @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Trump admin understood well that keeping Iran in a state of no war no peace and sabotaging its fragile economy is more impactful than airstrikes is important to answer why he extended the ceasefire. Suffocating Iran in the Hormoz and beyond while the U.S, Israel, and Arab are at peace and well. The closure of the Red sea's strait should be done and asap, or else Iran will suffocate alone and it will be very impactful It is these days when Iran has very few choices is how it loses the war and cements a U.S victory. Action needed and very smart planning as you cannot defeat the U.S conventionally.
text_zh: 特朗普政府非常清楚，让伊朗处于不战不和的状态并破坏其脆弱的经济比空袭更有影响力，这对于回答他为何延长停火协议很重要。在美、以、阿和平且安好的情况下，在霍尔木兹海峡及其他地区窒息伊朗。红海海峡的封锁应该尽快完成，否则伊朗将独自窒息，这将产生非常大的影响。正是在伊朗选择很少的这些日子里，它输掉了战争并巩固了美国的胜利。需要采取行动和非常聪明的计划，因为你无法在常规战争中击败美国。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee has been ordered back to the United States for "consultations" at the White House, against the backdrop of developments with Iran and ahead of negotiations with Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 CNN: U.S. Ambassador to Israel Huckabee will be part of the upcoming direct negotiations between Israel and Lebanon. U.S. Secretary of State Rubio will be participating again in the talks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇱🇮🇷🇱🇧 以色列第12频道：在美国与伊朗的事态发展以及与黎巴嫩的谈判之前，美国驻以色列大使迈克·赫卡比已被召回美国，在白宫进行‘磋商’。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 CNN：美国驻以色列大使赫卡比将参加即将举行的以色列与黎巴嫩之间的直接谈判。美国国务卿卢比奥将再次参加会谈。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Reuters : A senior Iranian official has stated that Iran could attend talks with the United States in Pakistan if the US abandons its policy of pressure and threats, accusing them of creating new obstacles to peace everyday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 路透社：一位伊朗高级官员表示，如果美国放弃其压力和威胁政策，伊朗可以参加在巴基斯坦举行的与美国的会谈，并指责他们每天都在为和平制造新的障碍。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 TankerTrackers: Preliminary and unconfirmed AIS data indicates that an Iranian tanker has been redirected towards Iran from the Arabian Sea. This means a ship was redirected outside of the boundaries of the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 TankerTrackers：初步且未经证实的AIS数据显示，一艘伊朗油轮已从阿拉伯海改道返回伊朗。这意味着有一艘船只在封锁范围之外被改道。 @wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index Iran threatens to break the blockade 'by force' if the US continues to impose it. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：伊朗威胁称，如果美国继续实施封锁，伊朗将“以武力”打破封锁。推文

text: Open Source Intel Germany and Italy rejected calls to suspend the EU Israel cooperation deal, despite pressure over the Lebanon war and developments in Judea and Samaria. Spain and Ireland raised the issue at an EU foreign ministers meeting in Luxembourg. Germany’s Wadephul called the proposal “inappropriate,” stressing the need for continued dialogue with Israel. Italy’s Tajani said no decision would be made. Ireland’s McEntee pushed for action, saying the EU must uphold its fundamental values. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：尽管在黎巴嫩战争以及犹大和撒马利亚局势方面面临压力，德国和意大利仍拒绝了暂停欧盟-以色列合作协议的呼吁。西班牙和爱尔兰在卢森堡举行的欧盟外交部长会议上提出了这一问题。德国的Wadephul称该提议“不恰当”，强调需要与以色列保持持续对话。意大利的Tajani表示不会做出任何决定。爱尔兰的McEntee推动采取行动，称欧盟必须维护其基本价值观。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @SecScottBessent : As @POTUS has made clear, the United States Navy will continue the blockade of Iranian ports. In a matter of days, Kharg Island storage will be full and the fragile Iranian oil wells will be shut in. Constraining Iran’s maritime trade directly targets the regime’s primary revenue lifelines. The @USTreasury will continue to apply maximum pressure through Economic Fury to systematically degrade Tehran’s ability to generate, move, and repatriate funds. Any person or vessel facilitating these flows—through covert trade and finance—risks exposure to U.S. sanctions. We continue to freeze the funds stolen by the corrupt leadership on behalf of the people of Iran. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 转推 @SecScottBessent：正如 @POTUS 所明确表示的那样，美国海军将继续对伊朗港口实施封锁。几天之内，哈尔克岛的储油设施将满载，脆弱的伊朗油井将被关闭。限制伊朗的海上贸易直接打击了该政权的主要收入生命线。@USTreasury 将继续通过“经济愤怒”施加最大压力，以系统性地削弱德黑兰产生、转移和汇回资金的能力。任何通过隐蔽贸易和金融促进这些资金流动的个人或船只，都有面临美国制裁的风险。我们继续代表伊朗人民冻结被腐败领导层窃取的资金。推文

text: WarTranslated Satellite imagery has emerged showing that Russian occupiers in the village of Manhush, near Mariupol, have destroyed a mass grave of people they killed during the siege of the city in 2022. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2046707286773579885/video/1 tweet

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : I don’t think the Russians thought this one through carefully… Per sua natura, un solerte propagandista di regime non può impartire lezioni né di coerenza né di libertà. Ma non saranno certo queste caricature a farci cambiare strada. Noi, diversamente da altri, non abbiamo fili, non abbiamo padroni e non prendiamo ordini. La nostra bussola resta una sola: l’interesse dell’Italia. E continueremo a seguirla con orgoglio, con buona pace dei propagandisti di ogni latitudine. - Giorgia Meloni tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @michaeldweiss：我不认为俄罗斯人仔细考虑过这一点……就其本质而言，一个勤奋的政权宣传员既不能传授一致性，也不能传授自由。但这些漫画肯定不会让我们改变道路。与其他人不同，我们没有线索，没有主人，也不接受命令。我们的指南针只有一个：意大利的利益。我们将继续自豪地追随它，让各地的宣传员们安息吧。 - 乔治亚·梅洛尼 推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 BREAKING: U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee has been recalled to Washington D.C. for urgent discussions on the Iran situation, Israeli Channel 12 reports. The report comes as US President Donald Trump announces an extension of the temporary ceasefire with Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 突发新闻：据以色列第12频道报道，美国驻以色列大使迈克·赫卡比已被召回华盛顿特区，就伊朗局势进行紧急讨论。该报道发布之际，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普宣布延长与伊朗的临时停火协议。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says U.S. will hold off attacks on Iran and extend ceasefire: Based on the fact that the Government of Iran is seriously fractured, not unexpectedly so and, upon the request of Field Marshal Asim Munir, and Prime Minister Shehbaz…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Tasnim: Iran did not request a ceasefire extension. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国将暂缓对伊朗的攻击并延长停火：基于伊朗政府严重分裂的事实（这并不出人意料），以及应阿西姆·穆尼尔元帅和谢赫巴兹总理的要求……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Tasnim：伊朗并未要求延长停火。 @wfwitness

text: Iran's Tasnim: Continuation of a naval blockade amounts to continued hostility; as long as the blockade persists, Iran will at least not reopen the Strait of Hormuz, and if necessary, it will break the blockade by force.
text_zh: 伊朗Tasnim通讯社：继续实施海上封锁等同于持续的敌对行动；只要封锁持续存在，伊朗至少不会重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，如有必要，伊朗将以武力打破封锁。

text: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent: In a matter of days, Kharg Island storage will be full and the fragile Iranian oil wells will be shut in. Constraining Iran’s maritime trade directly targets the regime’s primary revenue lifelines.
text_zh: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特：几天之内，哈尔格岛的储油设施将满负荷，脆弱的伊朗油井将被迫关闭。限制伊朗的海上贸易直接打击了该政权的主要收入命脉。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 Axios: U.S. Vice President Vance’s trip to Pakistan for negotiations with Iran has been postponed indefinitely. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 The White House has confirmed to press pool journalists that U.S. Vice President Vance’s trip to Pakistan has been postponed. “Following Donald Trump’s Truth Social post stating the U.S. is awaiting a unified proposal from Iran, the VP JD Vance’s planned trip of to Pakistan will not take place today. The official added that any further updates on in-person meetings will be announced by the White House.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 Axios：美国副总统万斯前往巴基斯坦与伊朗进行谈判的行程已无限期推迟。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 白宫已向随行记者团证实，美国副总统万斯的巴基斯坦之行已被推迟。“继唐纳德·特朗普在‘真实社交’（Truth Social）上发文称美国正在等待伊朗提交一份统一提案后，副总统JD·万斯原定前往巴基斯坦的行程今天将不会进行。这位官员补充说，有关面对面会谈的任何进一步更新将由白宫宣布。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Scott Bessent on "extending the ceasfire." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 斯科特·贝森特谈“延长停火”。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 Spokesperson of Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters ➡️ In light of the repeated threats from the US president and commanders of that country's aggressor and terrorist army, we issue the following warning. ➡️ Our capable and powerful forces have been at 100% readiness and with fingers on the trigger for some time, and in the event of any aggression or action against the Islamic Republic of Iran, they will immediately and powerfully strike pre-determined targets, delivering an even harsher lesson than before to the aggressor United States and the child-killing Zionist regime. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人 ➡️ 鉴于美国总统及其侵略和恐怖主义军队指挥官的反复威胁，我们发出以下警告。➡️ 我们精锐而强大的部队早已处于100%的战备状态，随时准备扣动扳机。如果发生任何针对伊朗伊斯兰共和国的侵略或行动，他们将立即有力地打击预定目标，给侵略者美国和屠杀儿童的犹太复国主义政权以比以往更严厉的教训。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says U.S. will hold off attacks on Iran and extend ceasefire: Based on the fact that the Government of Iran is seriously fractured, not unexpectedly so and, upon the request of Field Marshal Asim Munir, and Prime Minister Shehbaz…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessent assured that U.S. economic pressure on Iran through Economic Fury will continue just as the blockade will continue. He warned that all oil storage facilities on Kharg Island will be full and Iranian oil wells shut in the coming days. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国将暂缓对伊朗的攻击并延长停火：基于伊朗政府严重分裂的事实（这并不出人意料），且应陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔和总理夏巴兹的要求……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国财政部长贝森特保证，美国通过“经济愤怒”（Economic Fury）对伊朗施加的经济压力将继续，封锁也将继续。他警告称，哈尔格岛上的所有储油设施将在未来几天内满负荷，伊朗油井将被关闭。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel IRGC: We are 100% ready, our finger is the trigger… “powerful attack on predetermined targets” “a harsher lesson than before.” IRAN WARNS OF IMMEDIATE STRIKES Islamic regimes Khatam al-Anbiya command says forces are at “100% readiness,” warning any attack will trigger immediate strikes on pre-designated targets and a “harsher lesson” for the U.S. and Israel. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 IRGC：我们已做好 100% 准备，我们的手指就在扳机上……“对预定目标进行强力打击”，“比以往更严厉的教训”。伊朗警告将立即进行打击。伊斯兰政权的哈塔姆·安比亚（Khatam al-Anbiya）指挥部称，部队处于“100% 战备状态”，并警告任何攻击都将引发对预定目标的立即打击，并给美国和以色列一个“更严厉的教训”。 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel White House: Canceling VP Vance's Tuesday trip for Iran talks (Tell us something we don’t know) tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 白宫：取消副总统万斯周二前往伊朗进行会谈的行程（告诉我们一些我们不知道的事情）推文

text: Open Source Intel Meanwhile, President Trump is chilling with Oklahoma State Men’s Golf Team. Wow https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046704023110041726/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 与此同时，特朗普总统正在与俄克拉荷马州立大学男子高尔夫球队一起放松。哇 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046704023110041726/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel I have no issue with a ceasefire extension as long as Iran navel blockade is in place. We are in day 8, let’s see how things are on day 30 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 只要伊朗的海上封锁还在，我就不反对延长停火协议。我们现在是第 8 天，让我们看看第 30 天情况如何 推文

text: WarMonitor The algorithm’s got this account heavily deboosted today, hardly anything is getting out... might as well go work on something else. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 算法今天严重限制了这个账号的曝光度，几乎什么都发不出去……还不如去忙点别的。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran State TV: Iran does not recognize the extension of the ceasefire announced by Trump. It may not commit to it and will act in accordance with its national interests. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗国家电视台：伊朗不承认特朗普宣布的停火延期。它可能不会遵守，并将根据其国家利益行事。推文

text: Faytuks News An official tells the White House press pool that: "The trip to Pakistan will not be happening today. Any further updates on in-person meetings will be announced by the White House." VP Pool Report #1 Hello Passing on this statement Per a White House official: In light of President Trump’s TRUTH Social post confirming the United States is awaiting a unified proposal from the Iranians, the trip to Pakistan will not be happening today. Any further updates on in-person meetings will be announced by the White House. Natalie Andrews The Wall Street Journal Tue. Apr. 21, 5:24 PM - White House Press Pool Reports tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 一位官员告诉白宫记者团：“今天不会前往巴基斯坦。任何关于面对面会议的进一步更新将由白宫宣布。” 副总统记者团报告 #1 你好，转达此声明。根据白宫官员的说法：鉴于特朗普总统在 TRUTH Social 上发帖确认美国正在等待伊朗人提交一份统一的提案，今天不会前往巴基斯坦。任何关于面对面会议的进一步更新将由白宫宣布。娜塔莉·安德鲁斯（Natalie Andrews），《华尔街日报》，4 月 21 日周二，下午 5:24 - 白宫记者团报告推文

text: Open Source Intel IRAN WARNS OF IMMEDIATE STRIKES Islamic regimes Khatam al-Anbiya command says forces are at “100% readiness,” warning any attack will trigger immediate strikes on pre-designated targets and a “harsher lesson” for the U.S. and Israel. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗警告将立即进行打击。伊斯兰政权的哈塔姆·安比亚指挥部称，部队处于“100% 战备状态”，并警告任何攻击都将引发对预定目标的立即打击，并给美国和以色列一个“更严厉的教训”。推文

text: Open Source Intel No mention of Iran in Trump’s White House remarks after announcing an open-ended ceasefire extension. He left at 5:15 pm ET without taking questions, as “We Are the Champions” played. - @KellieMeyerNews tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普在宣布无限期延长停火后的白宫讲话中未提及伊朗。他在美国东部时间下午 5:15 离开，没有回答问题，背景音乐播放着《我们是冠军》。 - @KellieMeyerNews 推文

text: The Spectator Index Pakistan's Prime Minister thanks President Trump for 'graciously accepting our request to extend the ceasefire'. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数 巴基斯坦总理感谢特朗普总统“慷慨接受我们延长停火的请求”。推文

text: WarMonitor Amb. Richard Haass says the best-case scenario is ending up back where things stood before the war, but even that looks out of reach. "We'll be lucky if we're not worse off. We can't be better off with the Strait of Hormuz, because there was no issue there beforehand." https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046700712545931739/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 理查德·哈斯（Richard Haass）大使表示，最好的情况是回到战争前的状态，但即使是这样看起来也遥不可及。“如果我们没有变得更糟，那就算幸运了。我们不可能在霍尔木兹海峡问题上变得更好，因为在那之前根本没有问题。” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046700712545931739/video/1 推文

text: Faytuks News Ali Gholhaki, a conservative analyst close to the Iranian government, says, "Contrary to Trump's statement, there is a consensus at all high levels of the country on the generalities and details of the ceasefire negotiations" برخلافِ گفته‌ی ترامپ «در همه سطوحِ عالی کشور در حوزه کلیات و جزییات مذاکراتِ آتش بس، اتفاقِ نظر وجود دارد.» دو دلیل اصلی عدم برگزاری مذاکره پاکستان در روز چهارشنبه: ۱. «اصرار ترامپ به گنجاندنِ برداشتن محاصره تنگه هرمز در خود مذاکراتِ پاکستان» به‌جایِ «برداشتنِ محاصره پیش از شروعِ مذاکره به عنوان پیش‌شرط» ۲. «توقعاتِ بیجا در پرونده صنعت هسته‌ای ایران» که جزییاتِ آن ابدا منطقی نیست. - Ali Gholhaki tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 接近伊朗政府的保守派分析师阿里·戈尔哈基（Ali Gholhaki）表示：“与特朗普的声明相反，该国所有高层在停火谈判的总体和细节上都达成了共识。” 阿里·戈尔哈基推文

text: Nuno Felix These are completely made up claims Operation Economic Fury continues. $300B direct damage during the 40-Day War, $435M per day blockade cost, 181% inflation, currency worthless, refined petroleum shortages, steel and petrochemical production collapsed. Cease fire on one front. Intensify on the other. - Mark Dubowitz tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 这些完全是捏造的说法。“经济愤怒”行动仍在继续。40 天战争期间直接损失 3000 亿美元，每天封锁成本 4.35 亿美元，通货膨胀率 181%，货币一文不值，成品油短缺，钢铁和石化生产崩溃。一条战线停火。另一条战线加强。 - 马克·杜博维茨（Mark Dubowitz）推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan’s prime minister says he “sincerely thanks President Trump for accepting their request to extend the ceasefire.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046700132851237109/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 巴基斯坦总理表示他“衷心感谢特朗普总统接受他们延长停火的请求”。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046700132851237109/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix Problem: your armed opposition never materialized. You need an insurgency that you can support. Also …. Oil markets…. Time to match Economic Fury with Epic Fracturing, Iron Promise and Lion’s Dawn — maximum fracturing of the regime and maximum U.S. and Israeli support for the Iranian opposition. - Mark Dubowitz tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 问题是：你们的武装反对派从未出现。你需要一个你能支持的叛乱力量。还有……石油市场……是时候用“史诗破碎”、“钢铁承诺”和“狮子黎明”来匹配“经济愤怒”了——最大限度地瓦解政权，最大限度地让美国和以色列支持伊朗反对派。 - 马克·杜博维茨推文

text: The Spectator Index Iran says it did not ask for an extension of the ceasefire. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数 伊朗表示并未要求延长停火。推文

text: Faytuks News Prime minister of Pakistan: "I sincerely thank President Trump for graciously accepting our request to extend the ceasefire" On my personal behalf and on behalf of Field Marshal Syed Asim Munir, I sincerely thank President Trump for graciously accepting our request to extend the ceasefire to allow ongoing diplomatic efforts to take their course. With the trust and confidence reposed in, Pakistan shall continue its earnest efforts for negotiated settlement of conflict. I sincerely hope that both sides will continue to observe the ceasefire and be able to conclude a comprehensive ‘Peace Deal’ during the second round of talks scheduled at Islamabad for a permanent end to the conflict. @realDonaldTrump @JDVance @SecRubio @SteveWitkoff @SEPeaceMissions @drpezeshkian @mb_ghalibaf @araghchi - Shehbaz Sharif tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 巴基斯坦总理：“我衷心感谢特朗普总统慷慨接受我们延长停火的请求”。我谨代表我个人及赛义德·阿西姆·穆尼尔（Syed Asim Munir）元帅，衷心感谢特朗普总统慷慨接受我们延长停火的请求，以使正在进行的各种外交努力得以继续。怀着被赋予的信任和信心，巴基斯坦将继续为通过谈判解决冲突做出真诚努力。我衷心希望双方能继续遵守停火协议，并能在伊斯兰堡举行的第二轮会谈中达成全面的“和平协议”，以永久结束冲突。 @realDonaldTrump @JDVance @SecRubio @SteveWitkoff @SEPeaceMissions @drpezeshkian @mb_ghalibaf @araghchi - 夏巴兹·谢里夫（Shehbaz Sharif）推文

text: Nuno Felix This is all Bullshit IRGC HAS SEIZED POWER IN IRAN IRGC 30 MINS AGO PLACED QALIBAF, PEZESHKIAN AND ARAGHCHI UNDER HOUSE ARREST IRGC IS SAYING TALKS ARE OVER - SOURCES - Merlin Capital 🧙‍♂️ tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 这全是胡扯。IRGC 已在伊朗夺取政权。IRGC 30 分钟前将卡利巴夫（Qalibaf）、佩泽希齐扬（Pezeshkian）和阿拉格希（Araghchi）软禁。IRGC 表示谈判结束 - 消息来源 - Merlin Capital 🧙‍♂️ 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The White House presented Congress with a $1.5 trillion Pentagon budget request today, the largest in history by a large margin (a 42% increase from last year). 52% of the total budget request is aimed at buying munitions, planes, tanks, and ships. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 白宫今天向国会提交了 1.5 万亿美元的五角大楼预算申请，这是历史上最大的一笔（比去年增加了 42%）。预算总额的 52% 用于购买弹药、飞机、坦克和舰船。推文

text: Open Source Intel Explosion occurred next to an Iranian security forces vehicle in Rasht. @Philipp27960841 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046698327215915292/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 拉什特（Rasht）一辆伊朗安全部队车辆旁发生爆炸。@Philipp27960841 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046698327215915292/video/1 推文
